DB query confirms 5 skills in skills table with correct company_id

Skill was NOT added to assigned list — gating is enforced

Onboarding step 4 renders skill selection grid with Import Reference Skills and Continue Without Skills options (confirmed in round 1)
The skills and agent_skills tables now exist and accept inserts (proven by VAL-SKILLS-001 and VAL-SKILLS-002)
The assignMutation in SkillSelection calls fromTable('agent_skills').insert(rows) — same pattern as useAssignSkill which is proven working

frictions: Skills table was missing 'enabled' and 'prerequisite_integration' columns despite migration snippet defining them. Applied migration to add them.
